newsArray.title: Hardik Pandya IPL Trade: CSK, KKR Lead 7-Team Race for MI Captain
newsArray.description: Breaking: Mumbai Indians captain Hardik Pandya is reportedly on the cusp of leaving the franchise, triggering a fierce bidding war among at least seven IPL teams. Chennai Super Kings and Kolkata Knight Riders are believed to be frontrunners, while Gujarat Titans and Lucknow Super Giants are reportedly out of contention.
